svg.title: Create Shipping Agent Organization - Process View

g.text: Create Shipping Agent Organization - Process View
Administrator fills organization details\nand clicks "Create Organization"
Ensures LegalName and TaxNumber are provided\nand not empty
409 Conflict + "Organization with this tax number already exists"
Creates domain entity with:\n• Guid Id\n• CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
Displays success message\nand redirects to organization details page
409 Conflict + "Organization with this tax number already exists"
